# Spatial Reproducibility Report

**Git HEAD:** 6ca46a2
**renv.lock MD5:** 139bcfaf7ce24b633c9f034380a15ef5

## Phase Classification

| Phase | Classification | Rationale |
|-------|---------------|-----------|
| s01 | OBJECT_INSPECTION | Reads RDS, records structure, no method reproduction |
| s02 | OBJECT_DERIVED_VALIDATION | Validates metadata against s01 expectations; 109/109 PASS |
| s03 | METHOD_MATCH_WITH_WARNING | Method matches Author Script 7 (aggregate.Matrix + DESeq2). DEG: OY=677padj, MY=253, OM=102. No author reference DEG counts found. |
| s04 | METHOD_MATCH_WITH_WARNING | Method matches Script 8 lines 1-66 (msigdbr + AddModuleScore). Middle IS=48 vs author 60, Old IS=317 vs author 299. |
| s05 | RDS_APPROXIMATION | Uses RDS coordinate neighbor graph instead of STutility::RegionNeighbours. DESeq2 IS vs NNS Old: Up=2571/Down=1452 vs author 2357/1326. |
| s05b | RDS_APPROXIMATION | Visualization of Phase 05 labels; no independent computation. |
| s06 | OBJECT_DERIVED_VALIDATION | Validates Hippo regional structure from RDS metadata. 54/54 PASS. CA1=4671, CA2=565, CA3=2321, ML=1480, GCL=645, Hilus=239. |

## Discrepancy Table

| ID | Phase | Metric | Our Value | Author Expected | Source | Severity | Possible Causes |
|-----|-------|--------|-----------|----------------|--------|----------|----------------|
| D01 | 04 | Middle IS spots | 48 (2.00%) | 60 (2.50%) | docs/original_code_from_paper/Scripts/R/8. Spatial-Inflammatory gradient.R:41; phase04_validation_summary.txt | warning | msigdbr version, SCT assay gene differences, Seurat v4.3 vs v5.5.0 AddModuleScore behavior |
| D02 | 04 | Old IS spots | 317 (6.29%) | 299 (5.94%) | docs/original_code_from_paper/Scripts/R/8. Spatial-Inflammatory gradient.R:41; phase04_validation_summary.txt | warning | Same as D01 |
| D03 | 05 | IS vs NNS DEG Up (Old) | 2571 | 2357 | data/processed/spatial/phase05_rds_gradient/phase05_provenance.csv; Script 8 | caution | RDS coordinate margin (1.2x heuristic) vs STutility image masks; different neighbor sets |
| D04 | 05 | IS vs NNS DEG Down (Old) | 1452 | 1326 | data/processed/spatial/phase05_rds_gradient/phase05_provenance.csv; Script 8 | caution | Same as D03 |
| D05 | 05 | Neighbor graph method | RDS Euclidean coordinates | STutility::RegionNeighbours (image-mask propagation) | data/processed/spatial/phase05_rds_gradient/phase05_provenance.csv | blocker | Raw Visium files unavailable; cannot run STutility |
| D06 | ALL | Seurat version | v5.5.0 | v4.3 | renv.lock; author Script headers | caution | Assay slot structure, SCT behavior, SpatialKey differences |
| D07 | ALL | Raw Visium files | Not available | Required by Script 8 lines 71-697 | data/raw/spatial/ is empty | blocker | Not on Zenodo; author did not deposit raw Visium files |
| D08 | 05 | Label margin heuristic | 1.2x mean NN distance | STutility image propagation | data/processed/spatial/phase05_rds_gradient/phase05_provenance.csv | caution | No external calibration data for margin threshold |
| D09 | 03 | DEG OY count reference | 677 padj | No author reference found | data/processed/spatial/phase03_pseudobulk_deseq2/deg_summary.csv; Script 7 | info | Author Script 7 does not report total DEG counts |
